review: Sonnet found no blocking issues. Non-blocking: the implementation report's summary says 'timestamp' where the schema/UI actually use 'takenAt' (report-prose mismatch, not a code defect); character-history.ts renders entries in API response order with no client-side sort/assertion of the contract's newest-first ordering; no page-level test coverage for character-history.ts's Effect.gen composition and error branching (only the API client is tested); the mdx doc page isn't confirmed wired into a vocs sidebar.
notes: Character history page reuses the existing HistoryEntry schema and backend endpoint (GET /api/characters/{id}/history from A2). Page rendering follows character-detail.ts/crew-detail.ts pattern: Effect-based error handling, aria-live, loading/error states. Router extends main.ts to match /character/:id/history and dispatch to the history page. Character detail page links to its history page. Acceptance agent independently reran `npm test -- --run` (30/30) and `npm run build`, then spun up a fresh isolated backend-ada instance (existing bin/pitd binary, no server-side change in this slice; temp data dir, games seeded from the repo's data/games fixtures, port 9759), created a character via POST /api/characters, confirmed history is [] before any op and gains a decodable snapshotId/takenAt/op entry after a stress.add op, /character/{id}/history serves the SPA shell, and an unknown id's history returns 404; also reran the conformance suite's CHARACTER-HISTORY contract case and the full persistence/history.test.ts against that same instance. Exact server PID was stopped afterward and the temp data dir removed. No forbidden paths (contract/, conformance/, blades-in-the-sheets/) touched.
